calendarFaqs.q: When does school start for Fairfax County Public Schools in 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The first day of school for Fairfax County Public Schools is Monday, August 24, 2026. Students and staff are expected to report on this date to begin the new academic year.

calendarFaqs.q: When is spring break 2026-2027 for Fairfax County Public Schools?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring break for Fairfax County Public Schools runs Mar 22, 2027–Mar 26, 2027, 5 days.

yearNumbers.label: Starts Earlier
yearNumbers.detail: First day moves from Aug 25 to Aug 24 vs 2025–2026.

yearNumbers.label: Rosh Hashanah
yearNumbers.detail: School closed district-wide; date shifts earlier than 2025–2026 (Sep 23) due to the Jewish lunar calendar.

yearNumbers.label: Yom Kippur
yearNumbers.detail: School closed district-wide; falls about 10 days earlier than in 2025–2026 (Oct 2).

calendarNotes: Fairfax County Public Schools begins the 2026–2027 school year on August 24, 2026 and ends June 16, 2027 — one of the later end dates among Virginia's large districts. Spring Break runs March 22–26, 2027, aligned with Prince William County and Loudoun County.
